summary: تم إجراء اختبار شامل لتطبيق نادي بارع الشبابي. التطبيق يعمل بشكل ممتاز مع تنفيذ مكتمل لجميع الميزات المطلوبة

flaky_endpoints.issue: Quiz submission fails when competition is inactive
flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Returns 400 error 'المنافسة غير نشطة' when trying to submit answer to inactive competition
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Expected behavior - competitions must be active for submissions

passed_tests: Homepage loading with RTL Arabic layout
Student CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Question management (add questions with multiple choice options)
Points management system (positive and negative categories)
Quiz functionality (student selection, question display, answer submission)
Arabic text rendering and RTL support
